adapter_contract.hard_execution: Adapters must call the runtime API or the bound wrapper. OpenClaw agents must not call individual runtime scripts directly.
adapter_contract.formal_write_guard: Formal business writes require runtime draft, confirmation, and commit-token checks.

commands.name: init-runtime
commands.description: Initialize local runtime directories and SQLite schema.

commands.name: persist-input
commands.description: Persist raw inbound order-related input before interpretation.

commands.name: open-draft
commands.description: Open or update a guided intake draft from persisted input.

commands.name: prepare-confirmation
commands.description: Generate a confirmation preview and commit token when the draft is ready.

commands.name: commit-draft
commands.description: Commit a ready workflow draft after explicit confirmation token validation.

commands.name: resolve-association
commands.description: Resolve a pending association and update related draft context.

commands.name: allocate
commands.description: Allocate one cash transaction across receivable/payable/refund settlement targets. Must be called first with dry_run=true to receive a confirmation token; formal allocation requires confirm_token.

commands.name: refresh-control-tower
commands.description: Refresh derived commitments, followups, exceptions, and alerts.

commands.name: daily-report
commands.description: Generate the daily order operations report.

commands.name: history-search
commands.description: Search persisted raw inputs and imported legacy evidence.

commands.name: history-show
commands.description: Show one persisted history item in detail.

commands.name: history-replay
commands.description: Replay raw input history by channel session or business object thread.

commands.name: history-backfill
commands.description: Open a backfill draft from one imported legacy/history item.

commands.name: association-candidates
commands.description: List candidate targets for one pending association.

commands.name: resolve-pending
commands.description: Resolve one pending association by direct candidate target.

commands.name: backfill-queue
commands.description: List history backfill queue items.

commands.name: backfill-ready
commands.description: List history backfill drafts and readiness state.

commands.name: backfill-finalize
commands.description: Preview or commit a history backfill draft.

commands.name: smoke-runtime
commands.description: Run runtime foundation smoke checks.

commands.name: smoke-stage89
commands.description: Run guided-intake, commit, settlement, control-tower smoke checks.
